description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on push to main, on pull requests, and on repository creation. Use a matrix job strategy to test across multiple Python versions and operating systems, including ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version, install dependencies, build the project, and run tests in both C extension and pure Python fallback modes. Finally, build and upload packages as artifacts.
